node.html:
• Built autonomous AI marketing agents combining LLM reasoning, statistical inference, and multi-agent workflows.
  • Developed FastAPI integrations for Meta Graph and Google Ads APIs, ensuring concurrent operations via stateful circuit breakers, jittered exponential backoff, and a PostgreSQL distributed lock service with atomic CAS updates.
  • Architected a 13-model LLM fallback chain (Gemini/OpenRouter) featuring automated endpoint cooldowns, and built a Server-Sent Events (SSE) pipeline to deliver real-time, non-blocking agent updates.
  • Designed and deployed autonomous AI marketing agents with custom web interfaces:
    • Performance Marketer — Automates ad creation, real-time bid adjustments, and budget allocation across ad platforms. Live Link
    • Analytics & Forecasting — Employs predictive regression and time-series modeling to project future campaign yields. Live Link

• Designed a real-time telephony compliance engine processing 8 kHz PCM audio streams in 20 ms frames, accurately determining the earliest safe voicemail drop point.
  • Implemented DSP-based beep detector using FFT spectral analysis and silence-based Voice Activity Detection (VAD).
  • Integrated speech-to-text via Deepgram WebSockets with LLM semantic validation filters to minimize false positives.
